title: Diataxis Check Result
description: Output schema for a single diataxis documentation check

check.description: Check name, matches the script filename without extension

status.description: pass: check succeeded, fail: check found issues, skip: check not applicable, error: script broke

file.description: Path relative to the diataxis directory

line.description: Line number, null when not applicable

suggestions.description: Machine-readable improvement suggestions, empty on pass/skip
